query: with principals(id) as ( select id from tml_switchboard.principals($1::uuid) ) select ( exists (select 1 from principals where id = $4::uuid) or exists ( select 1 from tml_switchboard.jobs j join principals p on j.owner_id = p.id where j.job_id = $2::uuid ) or exists ( select 1 from tml_switchboard.job_grants g join principals p on g.subject_id = p.id where g.job_id = $2::uuid and g.permission::text = $3 ) ) as "authorized!"
